# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it responsibly. **Do not open a public issue.**

Instead, email <support@zealdocs.org> with a description of the vulnerability, steps to reproduce it, and any relevant details. You should expect an initial response within 48 hours.

We appreciate your efforts to disclose responsibly and will acknowledge your contribution once the issue is resolved.
